==== protectedAccessibilityCheck.tlua (29 errors) ====
    class C {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      protected constructor() {}
      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'constructor'.
                              ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
    }
    
    class B<T = any> extends C {}
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~

            ~

              ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                ~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'any' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                     ~~~~~~~

                             ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                             ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    
    class A extends B {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~

          ~

          ~

                    ~

                    ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'B'.
                      ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.

      ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
        new A();
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
      }
